name: Fafifufufufafa
lore:
Lore of Fafifufufufafa
                                    


HP Terus, also known as Fafifufufufafa is an Italian Brainrot that is a hamster holding a phone with red eyes created by TikTok user @noxaasht, The creator of Tung Tung Tung Sahur. They is an Indonesian Brainrot character. It probably has red eyes because it had too much screen time.
Lyrics
Indonesian (Original)
HP Terus! Hi takutnya! Inilah Fafifufufufafa, sosok orang yang saat bulan puasa hanya di kamar dan bermain HP. Tengoklah tuh ha! Mata di meran sangat ya mungkin bisa 24 jam di kamar dan hanya scroll TikTok. Sampai sekarang Fufu Fafa tidak tahu probowo sedang efisiensi kampus. Kalian jangan main HP Terus ya matanya merah sangat macam nih Fufu Fafa. Share ke teman kalian yang scroll Tiktok.
Translated (English)
Always on your phone! Hey, I'm scared! This is Fafifufufufafa, a person who spends the entire month of Ramadan just staying in their room and playing on their phone. Look at that! Their eyes are so red, maybe they can stay in their room 24 hours a day just scrolling Tiktok. Until now, Fufu Fafa doesn’t know that Probowo is carrying out campus streamlining. You guys shouldn’t keep playing on your phones, or your eyes will get as red as Fufu Fafa’s. Share this with your friends who keep scrolling TikTok.
Translated (Chinese)
总是玩手机！啊，好可怕！这是法菲·福福福·法法，整个斋月都窝在房间里玩手机。看看他！他的眼睛红红的，说不定他们24小时都窝在房间里刷Tiktok呢。到现在福福法法还不知道普拉博沃（印尼总统）正在进行校园效率改革。你们不要一直玩手机啊，不然眼睛会像福福法法一样很红。把这个分享给你们那些一直刷TikTok的朋友。
Translated (Italian)
Sempre al telefono! Ehi, ho paura! Questo è Fafifufufufafa, una persona che passa l'intero mese di Ramadan in camera sua a giocare con il telefono. Guarda! Ha gli occhi così rossi che forse potrebbe stare in camera sua 24 ore al giorno a scorrere TikTok. Fino ad ora, Fufu Fafa non sapeva che Probowo fosse in efficienza nel campus. Non giocare sempre con il telefono, ha gli occhi rossi come quelli di Fufu Fafa. Condividilo con i tuoi amici che scorrono TikTok.
